memories.event: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.

traditions.text: Colony adopted consensus governance in year 5
Kira Sol wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Slate Gorge perished from habitat breach in year 20
